data.title: Rogers Sugar Inc. declares CAD 0.09 dividend
data.description:
• Rogers Sugar Inc. (RSI:CA) declares  CAD 0.09/share quarterly dividend, in line with previous.
  • Payable Jan. 14; for shareholders of record Dec. 26; ex-div Dec. 26.
  • See RSI:CA Dividend Scorecard, Yield Chart, & Dividend Growth.

data.title: Medical Facilities renews normal course issuer bid
data.description:
• Medical Facilities (DR:CA) (OTCPK:MFCSF) has received approval from the Toronto Stock Exchange to make a normal course issuer bid for up to 1,805,324 of its 18,053,349 outstanding common shares, representing 10% of its public float.
  • The corporation may purchase the shares at prevailing market prices during the period from December 1, 2025, to November 30, 2026.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Corsair Gaming insider Thi La snaps up 50,000 shares
data.description:
• Corsair Gaming (CRSR) shares rose 7.5% in the after-hours trading on Wednesday following an insider purchase by CEO Thi La, who acquired 50,000 shares for approximately $305,000 on November 25, 2025, at $6.10 per share.
  • Thi La, CEO of Corsair Gaming's subsidiary and a 10% owner, now holds 480,726 shares after the buy, with no sales from her in the past year.
  • This comes on the heels of a leadership transition, with Gordon Mattingly set to become CFO, succeeding Michael G. Potter, effective December 2, 2025.

data.title: EZGO Technologies files $200M mixed securities shelf
data.description:
• EZGO Technologies (EZGO) has filed a registration statement with the SEC using a “shelf registration” process to offer up to US$200M in mixed securities.
  • The company may issue any combination of ordinary shares, debt securities, warrants, rights, or units in one or more offerings.

data.title: ARMOUR Residential REIT declares $0.24 dividend
data.description:
• ARMOUR Residential REIT (ARR) declares $0.24/share monthly dividend, in line with previous.
  • Forward yield 16.53%
  • Payable Dec. 29; for shareholders of record Dec. 15; ex-div Dec. 15.
  • See ARR Dividend Scorecard, Yield Chart, & Dividend Growth.

data.title: Protagenic Therapeutics receives Nasdaq non-compliance letter
data.description:
Protagenic Therapeutics (PTIX) has received a notification letter from Nasdaq indicating its non-compliance with the exchange’s listing rules, namely the minimum stockholders' equity requirement and timely filing of periodic reports.

The exchange told the company it no longer meets the required $2.5 million minimum stockholders’ equity based on its latest Form 10-QT. The exchange also said the company is out of compliance for not yet filing its September 30, 2025 Form 10-Q. The company says it is finishing the remaining work and expects to file the delayed report soon.

Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5815, because the company recently regained compliance and remains subject to a mandatory panel monitoring period, the Nasdaq Listing Qualifications Staff has issued a determination to delist the company's securities.

The company will request a hearing before a Nasdaq panel to present its plan to address both deficiencies.

Source: Press Release

data.title: Metal Energy to raise C$9.3M funding; Centerra Gold to become strategic investor
data.description:
• Metal Energy (MERG:CA) (OTCQB: MEEEF) plans to raise up to C$9.3 million through a new financing.
  • The offering includes 8.88 million flow-through shares priced at C$0.73 each and 6.2 million common shares priced at C$0.45 each. The proceeds will fund the company’s 2026 maiden drill program at the fully permitted NIV copper-gold-molybdenum project in British Columbia’s Toodoggone district.
  • After the financing closes, Centerra Gold (CGAU) (CG:CA) is expected to own roughly 9.9% of Metal Energy’s issued and outstanding shares.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: MingZhu Logistics raised $8M in direct offering
data.description:
• Univest Securities announced the closing of an $8M registered direct offering for its client MingZhu Logistics (YGMZ).
  • The company sold 8 million units at $1.00 per unit to select institutional investors, with each unit consisting of one ordinary share or a pre-funded warrant, plus one common warrant.
  • Univest Securities was the exclusive placement agent for this transaction.
  • MingZhu Logistics Holdings Limited is a logistics and transportation services provider focused primarily in the China market. 
  • The stock price traded 4.1% higher on Wednesday during after-market hours of trading.

data.title: Naver's Financial to buy South Korean crypto exchange operator in $10 billion deal
data.description:
• Naver Financial, the payment arm of South Korean internet giant Naver (OTCPK:NHNCF) to acquire Dunamu, the operator of Upbit, a cryptocurrency exchange in South Korea.
  • The acquisition will take place in an all-stock deal valued at ~$10.27 billion (15.13 trillion won).
  •  The deal involves Naver Financial issuing 2.54 shares for every one share held in Dunamu.
  • The transaction positions Naver (OTCPK:NHNCF) to capitalize on a rapidly growing cryptocurrency market in South Korea.

data.title: Alibaba starts selling Quark AI glasses in China, enters wearable race
data.description:
China's e-commerce giant Alibaba (BABA) has started selling its Quark AI smart glasses, powered by the Qwen and Quark's multimodal AI model, marking its entry into the consumer wearable tech segment.

The Quark S1 is designed with translucent displays that place digital layers over real-world views and includes built-in translucent micro-OLED displays for contextual information. It is equipped with cameras, bone conduction, microphones, and swappable batteries that are built to last up to 24 hours. 

Alongside the S1, which starts at 3,799 yuan ($537), Alibaba (BABA) offers a 1,899-yuan Quark G1 model. Both are available now via Alibaba's Tmall, JD.com, Douyin, and over 600 stores in 82 Chinese cities, with international versions planned for 2026 on platforms like AliExpress, according to a Bloomberg report.

The release extends Alibaba's (BABA) AI push following the Qwen app's 10 million users and integration into its Quark browser. This positions the company against Meta (META) in the wearables market.
